battleTraits.name: Cycle of Corruption
battleTraits.effect:
If it is the first battle round, roll a dice to determine which Cycle ability can be used this battle round. If you roll a 5 or 6, roll again. If it is not the first battle round, the next Cycle ability in the sequence is used this battle round instead of any previous Cycle abilities:
- 1. NUMBERLESS PESTS: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units.
- 2. PLAGUE OF MISERY: While enemy units are within 6" of any friendly units, they cannot use abilities that heal or return slain models to a unit.
- 3. BURGEONING FILTH: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with any friendly units.
- 4. NAUSEOUS REVULSION: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units.

enhancements.name: Subcutaneous Suppuration
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target your general.

enhancements.name: Gaseous Emanation
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within your general’s combat range to be the target.
enhancements.effect: The target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: Overripe Death's Heads
enhancements.declare: If your general is not in combat, pick a visible enemy unit within 7" of them to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

regimentAbilities.name: Corruption of the Land
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a terrain feature, then roll a dice for each enemy unit within 3" of that terrain feature.
regimentAbilities.effect: On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Putrefied Ground
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Enemy Hero Phase
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from the Move characteristic of enemy units, and subtract 1 from run rolls for enemy units.

abilities.name: Fleshy Abundance
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target that friendly unit until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Attention Seekers
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Bilewood Stilts
abilities.effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on this unit when it uses Retreat abilities.
